violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. Employee was observed handling toast with bare hands.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Celery dated 7/2 was beyond its 10 day serving date.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employees cell phone was on a prep counter in the kitchen.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents on a cart in the kitchen.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed duct tape on the handles of a double door refer.
